_comment: Project-scoped Claude Code settings, COMMITTED to git so every clone and every worktree subagent inherits the harness. The PostToolUse hook runs eslint on each edited TS file; exit 2 surfaces lint errors back to the model so it self-fixes before moving on. Machine-specific accretion (push perms, plugin config, absolute paths) goes in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored) — see settings.local.json.example. Keep this baseline minimal and obviously-safe.
